itemReviewed.name: Millennium National School - Hingane Home Colony,Karve Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
One of the best schools in Pune.
Very good focus on sports as well as good focus on academics. Good for lot of extra curricular activities.
Bus service is excellent.
Lunch and snacks served to students are also of best quality.
Very reasonably priced.
I will recommend this school for anyone within 6/8 km of this school.
Check with school for exact radius where school bus operates.
There were some odd news about some dispute which has caused some trouble, but  parents can ignore that matter,  it is due to some malicious intent of few people and integrity of the school cannot be questioned.

itemReviewed.name: Millennium National School - Hingane Home Colony,Karve Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
We went to the school today after taking 2 reviews. One where, our neighbour didn’t pay any donation for their admission and another where they were asked for a huge donation, where the amount is not a joke. They categorise the parents income and only those with highest incomes are given admission first, then the second round happens if there are seats left. Then comes the last round, where if the parent is impressed by the school campus after the school tour and by some means, you show interest, they tap that opportunity and try to encash it.

The management is either stupid or is not fair enough to raise funding from parents of all the students in the school rather than a select few. It’s not fair to burden only a few parents with all the donation for school ground or infrastructure development, where all the students in the school are getting benefit from, who didn’t even pay the donation and are rich. Because one thing is sure that, they don’t even short list ones with low income.

Be fair. Be smart.

Instil fair opportunity and good values in your students along with huge campus and all the sports facilities.

I know, now they’ll be like, don’t get admission, if you have so much problem. And to be frank, we’re not. We just wanted to check if it’s true with all the online reviews, and it’s true.

Values are always important for kids while growing up as it builds a majority of their personality rather than all the show off.

itemReviewed.name: Millennium National School - Hingane Home Colony,Karve Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: This school has a really big campus. There are many facilities. The teachers are great. There are many sports like Table Tennis, Basketball, Cricket, Lawn Tennis, Badminton, Volleyball, Football, Kho Kho and Martial Arts. The school also provides lunch, breakfast and snacks in the evening. They have many hobbies like Drama, Percussion, Synthesiser, Flute, Guitar, Art etc. The school also has extra sports classes in the evening (optional). The only thing that I don't like about this school is that the resources are not new and only renew once or twice a year. Overall, amazing.
